{%- comment -%} Overrides the competitive-verifier theme's toppage_body.html: - displays paths with the leading "src/" stripped (headers are included with bare names via -I src); - splits Catch2 unit tests (src/*.test.cpp) out of "Library Files" into their own "Unit Tests" section (they are not verification files, so they get a 🧪 marker instead of the not-verified warning icon). {%- endcomment -%} {%- for top in page.data.top -%}

{{ top.type }}

{%- for category in top.categories -%} {%- assign category_name = category.name | remove_first: "src/" -%} {%- if category_name != "" -%}

{{ category_name }}

{%- endif -%}
    {%- for item in category.pages -%} {%- assign is_unittest = false -%} {%- if top.type == "Library Files" and item.path contains ".test.cpp" -%} {%- assign is_unittest = true -%} {%- endif -%} {%- unless is_unittest -%} {%- assign name = item.path | remove_first: "src/" -%} {%- if item.title -%} {%- capture link_title -%}{{item.title | xml_escape }} ({{ name | xml_escape }}){%- endcapture -%} {%- else -%} {%- capture link_title -%}{{name | xml_escape }}{%- endcapture -%} {%- endif -%}
  • {{ site.icons[item.icon] }} {{ link_title | xml_escape }}
    • {%- endunless -%} {%- endfor -%}
{%- endfor -%} {%- if top.type == "Library Files" -%}

Unit Tests

{%- for category in top.categories -%} {%- assign category_name = category.name | remove_first: "src/" -%} {%- assign has_tests = false -%} {%- for item in category.pages -%} {%- if item.path contains ".test.cpp" -%}{%- assign has_tests = true -%}{%- endif -%} {%- endfor -%} {%- if has_tests -%} {%- if category_name != "" -%}

{{ category_name }}

{%- endif -%}
    {%- for item in category.pages -%} {%- if item.path contains ".test.cpp" -%} {%- assign name = item.path | remove_first: "src/" -%} {%- if item.title -%} {%- capture link_title -%}{{item.title | xml_escape }} ({{ name | xml_escape }}){%- endcapture -%} {%- else -%} {%- capture link_title -%}{{name | xml_escape }}{%- endcapture -%} {%- endif -%}
  • 🧪 {{ link_title | xml_escape }}
    • {%- endif -%} {%- endfor -%}
{%- endif -%} {%- endfor -%} {%- endif -%} {%- endfor -%}
